use_cases: Display key business metrics like revenue, user counts, or conversion rates in dashboard layouts
Show trend indicators with up/down/flat arrows and percentage deltas for performance tracking
Present financial or operational KPIs with color-coded tones (success, warning, danger) for status awareness
Use in analytics platforms to highlight important figures with optional icons and captions
Create compact metric displays in monitoring tools or executive reporting interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile KPI card component for displaying key performance indicators with trend visualization. Supports multiple visual tones (default, primary, success, warning, danger), trend indicators (up/down/flat), and optional icons. Designed with a flat, minimalist aesthetic and full dark mode support, making it ideal for dashboards in SaaS, fintech, or e-commerce applications.
